pageContext.title: Television
pageContext.description: The PM Group produces more television commercials for broadcast than any other agency in South Texas. We also create live and pre-produced video content for events, news shows, and sports shows. Our agency has been awarded over 50 Telly Awards for our television commercials, along with other prestigious national awards.

seo.title: TV Commercial Buying & Production Agency | The PM Group
seo.metaDesc: Our media buyers utilize the latest targeted TV tactics, purchasing television commercial spots to hit the most impactful audiences for your organization.
